scripts.install:backend: pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.build:frontend: npm run frontend:install && npm run build
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run frontend:install && npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run lint:frontend && npm run typecheck:frontend && npm run test:frontend
